title: Cyber-Security Maturity
blurb: Benchmark against NIST CSF in 15 questions
questions: We maintain an up-to-date asset inventory (hardware & software).
Multi-factor authentication is enforced for all privileged accounts.
Security patches are applied within 14 days of release.
We perform annual penetration tests and remediate critical findings.
End-point detection & response (EDR) covers ≥90 % of devices.
Logs are centralised and kept ≥180 days.
We have a tested incident-response run-book.
Staff undergo security awareness training every 6 months.
Data is classified (Public/Internal/Confidential/Restricted).
Backups are offline and restoration is tested quarterly.
Third-party risk assessments are completed before onboarding.
We align to a recognised framework (NIST/ISO 27001).
A named CISO (or equivalent) exists.
Cyber-insurance covers ≥80 % of expected loss.
Board receives cyber risk metrics ≥4 times per year.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'You are a CISSP certified consultant. Create a comprehensive 900-word board-level cyber-security maturity report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+' industry, '+d.employeeCount+' employees, '+d.annualRevenue+' revenue). Assessment score: '+avg+'/5. CRITICAL: Their selected implementation timeline is '+d.timeline+' with budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Follow NIST CSF framework. Provide 3 priority actions with realistic budget estimates. The contact is '+d.decisionMaker+'. IMPORTANT: Create a roadmap that matches their '+period+' timeline EXACTLY - do NOT create a 12-month plan if they selected 3 months! Use these phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions (array with title, description, timeline, budget), roadmap (use the exact phase keys provided), recommendations (array), keyFindings (array), nextSteps (array).'; }

title: Cloud Adoption Maturity
blurb: See how you stack against the 6 R's
questions: We have a documented cloud strategy aligned to business goals.
Cloud governance (tags, policies, cost controls) is enforced via IaC.
≥50 % of workloads run in a public cloud.
We use managed services (PaaS/Serverless) instead of VMs where possible.
CI/CD pipelines deploy to cloud automatically.
Cost optimisation reviews happen ≥ monthly.
Multi-account landing-zone is implemented.
Disaster-recovery is tested ≥ annually.
Security controls mirror on-prem standards.
Cloud skills program is in place for IT staff.
FinOps team owns cloud economics.
We have achieved >80 % elasticity (auto-scale).
Licences are continuously right-sized.
Exit strategy / vendor lock-in risk is documented.
Innovation sandboxes are available for teams.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'You are a cloud solutions architect. Generate a comprehensive 900-word Cloud Adoption maturity report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+' industry, '+d.employeeCount+' employees, '+d.annualRevenue+' revenue). Assessment score: '+avg+'/5. CRITICAL: Their implementation timeline is '+d.timeline+' with budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Use Gartner 5-stage model. Provide 3 quick-win migration candidates with ROI. The contact is '+d.decisionMaker+'. IMPORTANT: Create roadmap matching their '+period+' timeline - NOT a generic 12-month plan! Use phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions (array with title, description, timeline, budget), roadmap (use exact phase keys), recommendations (array), keyFindings (array), nextSteps (array).'; }

title: Cloud Security Maturity
blurb: Measure your cloud security posture vs. CSA CCM
questions: CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management) is deployed.
IAM roles follow least-privilege and are reviewed quarterly.
Secrets are stored in a cloud-native vault (KMS/KeyVault etc.).
Network segmentation (VPC/VNet) is implemented.
Encryption at rest and in transit is enforced by policy.
Vulnerability scanning runs weekly against cloud workloads.
CloudTrail/Activity-Logs feed SIEM in real time.
Container images are scanned before deploy.
We use CSP-native WAF/DDoS protection.
Compliance mappings (ISO 27017, SOC 2, FedRAMP) are complete.
DevSecOps pipeline includes SAST/DAST/IaC-scan.
Workload identity federation is used instead of long-lived keys.
Incident response playbooks specific to cloud exist.
Data residency controls meet legal requirements.
Security benchmarks (CIS 1.x) achieve ≥90 % pass.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'You are a cloud security specialist. Create a comprehensive 900-word Cloud Security maturity report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+' employees, '+d.annualRevenue+'). Score: '+avg+'/5. Map to CSA CCM v4. CRITICAL: Timeline is '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. Provide 3 critical controls with realistic costs. IMPORTANT: Roadmap MUST match '+period+' timeline. Use phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. Return ONLY JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions (array with title, description, timeline, budget), roadmap (exact phase keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }

title: AI Adoption Readiness
blurb: 10 questions to check if you're AI-ready
questions: Executive team has approved an AI budget for this fiscal year.
We have identified ≥3 high-impact AI use-cases.
Data required for these use-cases is accessible and clean.
A cross-functional AI governance council exists.
We own sufficient GPU/cloud compute for prototyping.
AI talent (data scientists, MLOps) is available in-house.
Business stakeholders understand AI limitations.
Model performance & drift monitoring is planned.
Legal/compliance signed off on AI risk framework.
We have a roadmap to move from pilot to production.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/10).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'You are an AI strategy consultant. Prepare 900-word AI Adoption report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+' employees, '+d.annualRevenue+'). Score: '+avg+'/5. MIT Sloan 6-stage model. CRITICAL: Timeline '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. Action plan with KPIs. IMPORTANT: Roadmap must fit '+period+' timeline! Phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. Return JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions (title, description, timeline, budget), roadmap (exact phase keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }

title: Hypervisor → Hyperscaler Licensing
questions: ≥70 % of x86 servers are virtualised on-prem.
We maintain active VMware / Hyper-V SnS.
Core-based Windows/SQL licences are >8 years old.
We have visibility into CPU utilisation per VM.
Peak-to-average utilisation ratio is >3:1.
Reserved Instance planning is performed annually.
We use Azure Hybrid Benefit / AWS BYOL where possible.
Oracle workloads are earmarked for licence reduction.
Centrally negotiated EA renewals happen ≤3 years.
FinOps team tracks effective cost per vCPU.
Cloud migration business case includes licence savings.
We have tested VMware Cloud on AWS/Azure.
Exit clauses with ISVs are understood.
Automation (Terraform/ARM) is used for provisioning.
Leadership approved 3-year TCO model for cloud.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'Licence optimisation expert. 900-word report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+', '+d.annualRevenue+') on VMware/Microsoft savings. Score: '+avg+'/5. CRITICAL: Timeline '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. ROI analysis, migration waves fitting '+period+'. Phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. Return JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions, roadmap (exact keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }

title: Application Modernisation
questions: ≥50 % of apps are containerised.
We use micro-services where appropriate.
CI/CD builds deploy in <30 min.
Mean time to recovery (MTTR) is <1 h.
We practice trunk-based development.
Automated test coverage is >80 %.
12-factor app principles are followed.
APIs are versioned and documented.
Apps are stateless where possible.
We have deprecated ≥1 legacy stack last year.
Observability (3 pillars) is implemented.
Security scanning is gated in pipeline.
Feature flags enable gradual roll-out.
Cloud cost per transaction is tracked.
Technical-debt ratio is <15 %.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'App modernisation architect. 900-word report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+', '+d.annualRevenue+') using 6 Rs. Score: '+avg+'/5. Timeline '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. 3 apps to refactor, ROI. Roadmap fits '+period+'. Phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions, roadmap (exact keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }

title: Managed Services Readiness
blurb: Is IT ready to outsource towers?
questions: We have documented SOPs for ≥80 % of IT operations.
Shift-left/self-service password reset is deployed.
Monitoring alerts feed into a single ITSM tool.
SLA breaches are tracked and reviewed monthly.
On-call rota covers 24×7 with <15 min response.
Patching windows are automated & approved.
Asset lifecycle (procure-to-dispose) is standardised.
Cloud billing is reconciled automatically.
Security incidents follow ITIL process.
We outsource ≤20 % of L1 support today.
Knowledge base articles are <90 days old.
Capacity planning forecasts ≥12 months.
Backup restore is tested ≥ quarterly.
IT budget is OPEX weighted (>60 %).
Executive sponsor for managed services exists.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'Managed services advisor. 900-word report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+', '+d.annualRevenue+'). Score: '+avg+'/5. Timeline '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. Towers ready, savings analysis. Roadmap '+period+'. Phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions, roadmap (exact keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }

title: Data Security Maturity
questions: Data-classification policy is enforced via DLP tooling.
Encryption keys are rotated automatically.
Privileged-access workstations (PAW) are mandated.
Data-loss incidents are logged & investigated.
We maintain an up-to-date data-flow diagram.
Shadow-IT cloud storage is discovered & managed.
Retention schedules are applied per jurisdiction.
Anonymisation techniques meet GDPR pseudonymisation standard.
Crown-jewel datasets have extra segmentation.
Third-party data sharing agreements include security addendum.
We perform data-privacy impact assessments (DPIA).
Insider-risk analytics detect abnormal data access.
Ransomware canaries are deployed in file shares.
Backup copies are immutable for ≥30 days.
Board reviews data-breach simulation results annually.
promptBuilder: function(d){ const avg=(d.scores.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/15).toFixed(1); const timelineMap={'Immediate (0-3 months)':'3-month','Short-term (3-6 months)':'6-month','Medium-term (6-12 months)':'12-month','Long-term (12+ months)':'18-month','Exploratory phase':'6-month'}; const period=timelineMap[d.timeline]||'12-month'; const quarters=period==='3-month'?{phase1:'Month 1',phase2:'Month 2',phase3:'Month 3'}:period==='6-month'?{phase1:'Months 1-2',phase2:'Months 3-4',phase3:'Months 5-6'}:period==='18-month'?{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4',q5:'Q5',q6:'Q6'}:{q1:'Q1',q2:'Q2',q3:'Q3',q4:'Q4'}; return 'Data security officer. 900-word report for '+d.company+' ('+d.industry+', '+d.employeeCount+', '+d.annualRevenue+'). Score: '+avg+'/5. NIST 800-53. Timeline '+d.timeline+', budget '+d.projectBudget+'. Contact: '+d.decisionMaker+'. 3 priority items, costs. Roadmap '+period+'. Phases: '+JSON.stringify(quarters)+'. JSON: executiveSummary, maturityLevel, overallScore, priorityActions, roadmap (exact keys), recommendations, keyFindings, nextSteps.'; }
